name: "O Lips, Weave Me Songs and Psalms"
title: Lauma: "O Lips, Weave Me Songs and Psalms"
in_play_description: After you trigger Bloom or Lunar-Bloom: Heal your most injured character for 2 HP. (Once per Round)

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Lauma to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

skills.desc:
Combat Action: When your active character is Lauma, equip this card.
After Lauma equips this card, immediately use Runo: Dawnless Rest of Karsikko once.
After you trigger Bloom or Lunar-Bloom: Heal your most injured character for 2 HP. (Once per Round)
(You must have Lauma in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
